name: Implement Presigned URL Generation API
description: Develop POST /groups/generate-presigned-urls to allow secure document uploads to cloud storage.

name: Develop Document Parsing Engine for DOCX and Excel
description: Implement robust parsing logic to extract structured data from uploaded DOCX and Excel files as input for the AI engine.

name: Implement AI Sprint Generation API
description: Develop POST /groups/{group_id}/sprints/generation to process parsed data and generate tasks using LLM integration.

name: Implement RBAC for AI Generation Features
description: Enforce security rules to ensure only users with 'Owner' or 'Manager' roles can access AI generation endpoints.

name: Develop Document Upload and Context Input UI
description: Create the frontend interface for file uploads and a text area for users to provide 'Additional Context' for AI generation.

name: Develop Sprint Preview and Edit Interface
description: Build a UI component to display AI-generated tasks in a preview mode, allowing users to edit or delete items before final submission.

name: Implement Sprint Export to Excel API
description: Develop GET /groups/{group_id}/sprints/{sprint_id}/export to generate and download a formatted Excel file of the sprint backlog.

name: Implement Task Classification and Metric Logic
description: Develop backend logic to classify tasks (EARLY, LATE, SPILLOVER) and calculate metrics like completion rate and total story points.

name: Develop Sprint Burndown Dashboard
description: Create a visualization layer to display the burndown chart comparing ideal vs. actual progress based on daily completion data.
